# Gherkin Scenarios

## Purpose

Structure test scenarios using Given/When/Then format.

## Scenarios Required

- **Happy path**: Normal, expected user workflows
- **Negative path**: Expected error or rejection scenarios
- **Boundary path**: Edge cases, limits, and constraints
- **Regression path**: Known issues or previously fixed bugs

## Requirements

✓ Each scenario maps to exactly ONE acceptance criterion
✓ Each scenario is independent and reusable
✓ All data is traceable to Story
✓ No invented business logic
